statement: example (p q r : Prop) : (p ∧ q) ∧ r → p ∧ (q ∧ r)
hidden_reference_proof:
by
  intro h
  exact And.intro h.left.left (And.intro h.left.right h.right)

statement: example (p q : Prop) : p ∨ q → q ∨ p
hidden_reference_proof:
by
  intro h
  cases h with
  | inl hp => exact Or.inr hp
  | inr hq => exact Or.inl hq

statement: example (p q : Prop) : (p → q) → ¬ q → ¬ p
hidden_reference_proof:
by
  intro hpq hnq hp
  exact hnq (hpq hp)

statement: example (p q : Nat → Prop) : (∃ n : Nat, p n ∧ q n) → ∃ n : Nat, q n ∧ p n
hidden_reference_proof:
by
  intro h
  cases h with
  | intro n hn =>
      exact Exists.intro n (And.intro hn.right hn.left)

statement: example (a b : Nat) : a = b → a + 1 = b + 1
example {α β : Type} (f : α → β) (a b c : α) : a = b → b = c → f a = f c
hidden_reference_proof:
by
  intro hab hbc
  rw [hab, hbc]

statement: example (p q r : Prop) : (p → q ∧ r) → (p → q) ∧ (p → r)
hidden_reference_proof:
by
  intro h
  exact And.intro (fun hp => (h hp).left) (fun hp => (h hp).right)

statement: example (p q r : Prop) : (p → r) → (q → r) → p ∨ q → r
hidden_reference_proof:
by
  intro hpr hqr hpq
  cases hpq with
  | inl hp => exact hpr hp
  | inr hq => exact hqr hq

statement: example (a b c : Nat) : (a + b) + c = a + (b + c)
hidden_reference_proof:
by
  exact Nat.add_assoc a b c

by
  intro h
  exact Iff.intro h.mpr h.mp
